subject: Re: evolutionary set theory
body:
jeffrey

details in writing will come. i need a few days.

the figure was just the documentation of victory
- the proof that we have reached the peak.

m






On May 11, 2008, at 7:30 PM, J. Epstein wrote:

more details please


----- Original Message ----
From: Martin Nowak <nowak@fas.harvard.edu>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Sunday, May 11, 2008 9:02:51 AM
Subject: evolutionary set theory


jeffrey,

i have never seen
such perfect agreement
between curves and points
in my entire career.

the curves are the result of the longest mathematical
calculation ever done in biology.

(its complexity trivializes every previous approach.
its ingenuity sets a record which is never to be broken.)

m
